summary: Read-only plan for Gitcrawl cluster 31. #54397 remains the best live canonical for broad Topic/Session Management UI. Security-signal refs are quarantined individually with route_security. The remaining open candidates split into related subfamilies for session UI, document title, guarded shortcuts, and rename affordances; no close, merge, fix, or PR-raise action is planned.
